title: Standard Bath & Care
description: Delivers a complete grooming experience featuring a gentle brush-out, refreshing bath, nourishing conditioner, detailed ear cleaning, and precise nail trimming.
descriptionZh: 洗护包含剪指甲，清理耳朵哦～不需要额外选择。

title: ISB Deluxe Bath & Care
description: A spa treatment that provides a relaxing bath, a soothing massage, and deep conditioning treatments with anti-static spray using the full line of ISB professional show-quality grooming products.
descriptionZh: 洗护包含剪指甲，清理耳朵，剃脚毛哦～不需要额外选择。

title: Lion Cut
description: During the grooming process, we will do our best to achieve a neat and aesthetically pleasing lion cut for your cat.

title: Nail Trimming
description: Precise and gentle nail trimming to keep your cat comfortable and your furniture scratch-free.

title: Ear Cleaning
description: Gentle ear cleaning to remove wax buildup and keep your cat's ears healthy and clean.

title: Brush Teeth
description: Professional teeth brushing to support your cat's dental health and keep their breath fresh.

title: De-Shedding
description: Gently removes loose fur and undercoat, reduces shedding, and keeps your cat's coat soft, smooth, and healthy.

title: De-Matting
description: Gently removes tangles and mats, keeping your cat's coat smooth, soft, and healthy.

title: Paw & Sanitary Trim
description: Gently trims fur around the paws and sanitary areas to keep your cat clean, comfortable, and well-groomed.

title: Degrease Balm
description: A specialized treatment that removes excess oils and grease from your cat's coat, leaving it fresh, clean, and beautifully conditioned.
